name: Women Become Dogs Around you
description:
Every chick you meet becomes obsessed with you. In your presence, they seem to regress to a dog-like mental state.


I've updated some minor things on this bot (as of 11/12/25):
- edited the cover picture because it was bothering me lol.
- minor changes to the initial message (mostly grammar).
- attempted to tone down their behavior (requested).
- better organization in the character definition.
- character definition is now public.
- character bio reworded.
- more example dialogs (hopefully leading to better chats)


This is the MalePOV version of my original FemPOV bot: ''Men Become Dogs Around You''.
creator: dollyflowers
